response.reasoning: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with consistent work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS. He has direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, aligning with the required AI agent development skill. His work with Vitest-equivalent testing (TDD, CI/CD, custom test runners) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) is well-documented. He has used PostgreSQL/MySQL/MongoDB, Git, and multiple languages including Java and Kotlin-adjacent DLang. His open-source contributions and workshops demonstrate strong communication, collaboration, and process improvement — key for an IC role. His MIT degree satisfies the education requirement. Minor gaps: no explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest by name, and German is only basic, though not critical for an engineering role in Berlin. His extensive portfolio and recent AI-agent work strongly offset these.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud infrastructure
Proven AI-agent development experience via MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions, testing culture, and process improvement initiatives (CI/CD, TDD, workshops)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalent frameworks and testing practices are present
German language skills are only basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise environment
Some roles involve DLang and legacy stacks; potential concern about recent focus on modern TS/Node ecosystem
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the core requirements with deep full-stack experience, proven AI-agent work, and a strong track record in scalable, test-driven development using the primary stack. While he lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, his equivalent expertise and recent role at re:cinq suggest rapid adaptability. His MIT background, open-source leadership, and process-oriented mindset make him a high-potential individual contributor.
